title: Detection of Salmonella Typhi, associated microbial communities and AMR genes within wastewater in Harare, Zimbabwe
author: Matthews, Michaela
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Supplementary tables and materials. Files include: 
  Supplementary table 1.  Sample metadata for 100 wastewater samples. 
  Supplementary table 2 . Quantitative PCR (qPCR) results for the  ttr ,  staG  and  tviB  marker genes. 
  Supplementary table 3.  Rarefied count distribution for bacterial, eukaryotic, protist and amoebozoa datasets across wastewater samples. 
  Supplementary material.  Associated statistical modelling and tests for the bacterial, protist and amoebozoa datasets.
